title: Phase 4: author CLAUDE.md==AGENTS.md + PRD (harvest neighbours)
description: Harvest best-bits from ../cft-anyons, ../Bennett.jl, ../af-tests, ../arithmetic-quantum-mechanics (user directive). Reconcile bd's minimal CLAUDE.md + 'no MEMORY.md' rule with the ~/.claude memory system. Numbered Rules, ground-truth law, reviewer!=author, re-read-after-compaction.

title: Phase 3: af pilot — prove lem-P-properties (ready frontier)
description: Stand up proofs/lem-P-properties via 'af init'; transcribe the proof to trivial steps; A=prover/B=verifier (prover!=verifier per node); drive to validated+clean; set the shard af: none->seeded->validated; rerun argument.py --check. Proves the af->report->Lean pipeline. See HANDOFF.md recipe.

title: Phase 2b: seed remaining argument registry shards
description: One argument/lemmas/<id>.md per remaining result (~35-55). Harvest from report/PROVENANCE.md per-claim ledger (every lemma/thm/op + source+locus+status) and theory/. Then run scripts/argument.py --check --generate. Schema: argument/README.md. The 5 bridge shards are the template.

title: [open-math] re-audit B's matrix exact-adjoint benchmark (rem:matrix-audit)
description: Independent re-audit of the high-rank matrix splitting; earlier Haagerup route had an ordinary-vs-cb gap; matching route claims closure, unverified.

title: [open-math] NPPS / global exposed-hull lemma (exact UP factorization)
description: Near-positive projection stability at sqrt(delta); commutative core = global exposed-hull lemma. Sole open input to Theorem C.

title: [open-math] Layer-1 dimension-free order-norm coboundary splitting (H_n)
description: THE open Layer-1 obstruction: bounded right-inverse of d^1 in operator norm, uniform in n for H_n(R/C/H). Frobenius bounded but op-norm open. See agent-a/b-findings, theory/layer1.

title: Byte-verify draft defs (decomposable-map, multiplicative-domain) vs refs/vlw; lock
description: The two status=draft cited defs warn in check-defs. grep the exact VLW loci in refs/vlw-2604.08380/paper.tex, confirm statements, set status: locked.

title: Phase 4: add check-provenance.py + report latexmk build to check-all.sh
description: check-provenance.py: every report/registry source row resolves to refs/manifest + SHA256 (warn if payload absent). Add 'cd report && latexmk -pdf -halt-on-error'.

title: Phase 4: reorg theory/ + experiments/ + archive clutter (history-preserving git mv)
description: Consolidate agent-A/agent-B theory+experiments by subject; archive/ the 19 phantom response-to-agent-a-v*, superseded theorem-stack v0.1/v0.2, 91KB compaction-checkpoint.md. Nothing deleted.

title: Phase 2/3: add 'af replay --verify' per proofs/* to check-all.sh
description: Extend scripts/check-all.sh once af workspaces exist; ledger content-hash integrity gate.

title: Phase 3: af workspaces for first-insertion, square-hole, prop-bridge-jordan, thm-bridge
description: After the pilot: one af workspace per remaining bridge node, in dependency order; thm-bridge last. deps: aipm-0

title: Phase 2b: real beads sync in scripts/argument.py (replace dry-run stub)
description: Mirror registry -> bd: one issue per lemma, bd dep edges = shard deps, persist a lemma<->bd-id map. Serialize bd calls. See argument.py main() --sync-beads stub.

title: [open-math] alpha=1 exponent for general/decomposable positive maps
description: sqrt(eta) unconditional; eta open. Decomposable route needs dilation-compatible UCP lift. See report sec:exponent.

title: Phase 5: fresh Lean scaffold (lean/, pinned mathlib; af-tests reference only)
description: Secondary. lean/ lakefile + toolchain; transcribe a lemma only after its af workspace validates (node IDs = correspondence map). Do NOT depend on af-tests.
